scripts.db:connect:info:
echo '-----
Connect to DB using localhost:1433' && echo "For credentials run: aws --profile $AWS_PROFILE --region us-east-1 secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id $ENV-BobtailLMAuroraDatabaseSecret --query 'SecretString' --output text | jq
------"
scripts.db:connect: npm run db:connect:info && aws ssm start-session --profile $AWS_PROFILE --region us-east-1 --target $(aws --profile $AWS_PROFILE ec2 describe-instances --region us-east-1 --filters "Name=tag:Name,Values=$ENV-bastion-host" "Name=instance-state-name,Values=running" --query 'Reservations[*].Instances[*].InstanceId' --output text) --document-name AWS-StartPortForwardingSessionToRemoteHost --parameters host="$(aws --profile $AWS_PROFILE rds describe-db-cluster-endpoints --query 'DBClusterEndpoints[*].Endpoint' --filters 'Name=db-cluster-endpoint-type,Values=writer' --db-cluster-identifier $ENV-bobtaillm-db --output text | cut -f1)",portNumber="5432",localPortNumber="1433"
scripts.db:connect:dev: export ENV=lm-dev && export AWS_PROFILE=bobtail-sandbox && npm run db:connect
scripts.db:connect:migration:start-session: aws ssm start-session --region us-east-1 --target $(aws ec2 describe-instances --region us-east-1 --filters "Name=tag:Name,Values=$ENV-bastion-host" "Name=instance-state-name,Values=running" --query 'Reservations[*].Instances[*].InstanceId' --output text) --document-name AWS-StartPortForwardingSessionToRemoteHost --parameters host="$(aws rds describe-db-cluster-endpoints --query 'DBClusterEndpoints[*].Endpoint' --filters 'Name=db-cluster-endpoint-type,Values=writer' --db-cluster-identifier $ENV-bobtaillm-db --output text | cut -f1)",portNumber="5432",localPortNumber="1433" &
scripts.db:connect:migration:stop-session: aws ssm terminate-session --session-id $(aws ssm describe-sessions --state "Active" --filters "key=Owner,value=$(aws sts get-caller-identity --query 'Arn' --output text)" "key=Target,value=$(aws ec2 describe-instances --region us-east-1 --filters "Name=tag:Name,Values=$ENV-bastion-host" "Name=instance-state-name,Values=running" --query 'Reservations[*].Instances[*].InstanceId' --output text)" "key=Status,value=Connected" --query 'Sessions[].{SessionId:SessionId,StartDate:StartDate} | reverse(sort_by(@, &StartDate)) | [0].SessionId' --output text)
scripts.db:connect:prod: export ENV=lm-prod && export AWS_PROFILE=bobtail-20 && npm run db:connect
scripts.schema:fresh:development: DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=1433 AWS_PROFILE=bobtail-sandbox NODE_ENV=development mikro-orm schema:fresh --run
